description_long: This is a green glass beer bottle with a long neck and a slightly wider base, typical of many commercial beer containers. The front features a prominent black label bordered by red bands, with white Cyrillic script and a gold circular emblem at the top center of the label. The bottle's surface appears matte and unadorned except for the label, with no visible embossing or additional decoration. The cap is metallic and dark in color, likely a crown cap style, and fits snugly on the bottle's mouth. The back and sides of the bottle are plain green glass, with the label only covering the front portion. The overall appearance is clean and classic, suitable for retail or casual urban environments.
description: A green glass beer bottle with a black and red label featuring white Cyrillic text and a gold emblem, capped with a dark crown cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black and red label with white Cyrillic text and a gold emblem, as well as the dark crown cap.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain green glass surface and the edge of the label wrapping slightly around the bottle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the unadorned green glass back of the bottle, with no label or markings visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the transition from the labeled front to the plain green glass back.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features bold black and red bands with white Cyrillic text and a gold circular emblem, using a classic and straightforward design with high contrast and minimal imagery.
